descriptionTemplate: Kathigu-Ra gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At turn start, additionally grant 1 stack of {Fiamma} to 1 of Kathigu-Ra's Command Cards in hand. After playing a Command Card with 3 stacks of {Fiamma}, return it to hand.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Kathigu-Ra gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At turn start, additionally grant 1 stack of {Fiamma} to 1 of Kathigu-Ra's Command Cards in hand. After playing a Command Card with 3 stacks of {Fiamma}, return it to hand. Final DMG and {STR} effect per stack of {Fiamma} +30%.
